title: La Traviata Cast Announced — Season Opener Tickets on Sale Now
excerpt: We are thrilled to announce the full cast for our season-opening production of Verdi's La Traviata. Tickets for the May 15th performance are now available online and at the box office.

title: Holly Community Center Wins State Arts Excellence Award
excerpt: The EveryVoice Emerald Coast Arts Program has been recognized with the State Arts Excellence Award for outstanding contributions to community arts education. We are deeply honored by this recognition.

title: Summer Scenes Concert — Free Outdoor Performance July 4th
excerpt: Join us under the stars for a free Independence Day concert at Riverside Park Amphitheater. Our talented performers will sing beloved opera highlights in a relaxed, family-friendly setting.

title: Youth Vocal Program Spring Enrollment Now Open
excerpt: Spaces are filling up fast for our spring youth vocal training sessions. Open to students ages 8–18, our program builds confidence, technique, and a lifelong love of music.

title: Soprano Maria Deluca Named Regional Performer of the Year
excerpt: Our own Maria Deluca has been named Regional Performer of the Year by the Tri-State Opera Association. Her portrayal of Violetta last season captivated audiences and critics alike.

title: Community Food Drive at December Gala
excerpt: This year's Holiday Gala will feature a community food drive benefiting the Holly Area Food Pantry. Guests who bring three or more non-perishable items will receive a complimentary program.
